content.cn_text: 学生佩妮和两个朋友雷和
content.en_text: A student, Penny, talking to two friends, Ray and

content.cn_text: 路易斯，关于雷参加的一个电视比赛，叫做“旅行纪录片”。
content.en_text: Louise, about a television competition Ray has entered, called 'Travel Documentary'

content.cn_text: P:嗨。好久没见到你们了。你最近在忙什么?
content.en_text: P: Hi. Haven't seen you two in ages. What have you been up to?

content.cn_text: L:嗨，Penny。雷真的很兴奋。他刚刚入围了“旅行纪录片”。他可以花三个月的时间环游世界。
content.en_text: L: Hi Penny. Ray is really excited. He has just been shortlisted for 'Travel Documentary'.He could be off travelling around the world for 3 months.

content.cn_text: P:《旅行纪录片》。那是什么?
content.en_text: P: 'Travel Documentary'. What's that?

content.cn_text: L:你没听说过吗?你不看电视吗?
content.en_text: L: You've never heard of it? Don't you watch TV?

content.cn_text: P:嗯，实际上没有，几乎没有。尤其是我已经开始写论文了。我连呼吸的时间都没有，更别说看电视了。这到底是怎么回事，雷?
content.en_text: P: Well, actually no, hardly ever. Especially since I've started working on my thesis. I don't have time to breathe, let alone watch TV. So, what's this all about, Ray?

content.cn_text: R:嗯，实际上这是公共电视台举办的比赛。它涉及到我的两大爱好，旅游和电影制作。
content.en_text: R: Well, actually it's a competition run by Public TV. It involves my two great loves, travel and film-making.

content.cn_text: P:是那个人们被派到世界各地拍摄纪录片的节目吗?我听说过。太棒了!这么说，你被选中了?
content.en_text: P: Is it that program where people are sent around the world making documentary videos?I have heard of it. Fantastic! So, you've been chosen?

content.cn_text: R:还没有。我是下周参加面试的34人之一，所以我已经通过了第一轮筛选。
content.en_text: R: Not yet. I'm one of 34 selected for an interview next week so I've made it through the first cut.

content.cn_text: L:是的，有200多名来自全国各地的申请者。很神奇吧?
content.en_text: L: Yeah, there were over 200 applicants from around the country. Pretty amazing heh?

content.cn_text: R:嗯，到目前为止我还算幸运。
content.en_text: R: Well, I've been lucky so far.

content.cn_text: 病人:下一阶段是什么?
content.en_text: P: What's the next stage?

content.cn_text: R:从面试中选出13人参加为期4周的纪录片制作培训课程。然后，决赛入围者将带着一台摄像机前往世界各地。
content.en_text: R: Thirteen are chosen from the interview to do a 4 week training course in documentary film-making. Then, the  8 finalists get sent off with a video camera to travel around the world.

content.cn_text: P:听起来不可思议。有什么隐情?
content.en_text: P: Sounds incredible. What's the catch?

content.cn_text: R:问题是，你必须每两周从世界不同的地方发送一段10分钟的视频。它与其他三位竞争者的作品一起在电视上播出，并由专家小组和电视观众进行评判。所以，你的压力很大。
content.en_text: R: The catch is that every 2 weeks you have to send in a 10 minute video from a different part of the world. It's broadcast on TV along with the work of three of the other competitors and judged by a panel of experts and the TV audience. So, you're under a lot of pressure.

content.cn_text: P:哇，我想是的。你是说，你每两周上一次电视?
content.en_text: P: Wow, I guess so. You mean, you're on television every two weeks?

content.cn_text: R:是的，没错。但首先我得被选中。
content.en_text: R: Yep, that's right. But first I have to be selected.

content.cn_text: L:你一定要有电影制作经验才能申请吗?
content.en_text: L: Do you have to have any film-making experience to apply?

content.cn_text: R:有一些摄影或视频制作方面的背景会有所帮助，但你不应该是专家。事实上，如果你已经从事过电影制作，你就不能申请了。我们
content.en_text: R: Some background in photography or video-making helps but you're not supposed to be an expert. In fact, you can't apply if you have already worked in film-making. We

content.cn_text: 所有人都接受同样的4周课程，所以我们从同样的技能开始。
content.en_text: all get the same 4 week course so we start with the same skills.

content.cn_text: P:你能去世界上任何你想去的地方吗?
content.en_text: P: Can you go anywhere in the world you want?

content.cn_text: R:每位参赛者制定自己的旅行计划，并且必须得到批准。
content.en_text: R: Each competitor makes up his or her own travel plans and has to get them approved.

content.cn_text: (停顿)
content.en_text: (Pause)

content.cn_text: L:你和其他做过这件事的人谈过吗?
content.en_text: L: Have you talked with anyone else who has done it?

content.cn_text: R:事实上，就在上周，我遇到了莎拉·普莱斯，一个来自这里的女孩，她去年做过这个。
content.en_text: R: As a matter of fact, just last week I met Sarah Price, a girl from here who did it last year.

content.cn_text: L:她是怎么说的?
content.en_text: L: What did she have to say about it?

content.cn_text: R:她说这是她一生中最美妙的经历，但有时真的很艰难。
content.en_text: R: She said it was the most amazing experience of her life but it was really tough at times.

content.cn_text: L:我觉得你必须非常勇敢才能独自承担这么多责任。这不像去度假，对吧?
content.en_text: L: I think you'd have to be really brave to take off like that alone with so much responsibility. It's not like going on a holiday, is it?

content.cn_text: R:没有。在一个你通常不会说当地语言的国家待上两周，寻找一个故事，拍摄，组织所有的剪辑。然后你要去世界上一个完全不同的地方重新开始。很累，但也很刺激!
content.en_text: R: No. Two weeks in a country, often where you can't speak the language to find a story,film it, organise all the editing. Then you're off to a completely different part of the world to start all over again. Pretty exhausting, but exciting too!

content.cn_text: P:真是一种看世界的方式啊!
content.en_text: P: What a way to see the world!

content.cn_text: L:那莎拉·普莱斯呢?她有什么不好的经历吗?
content.en_text: L: What about Sarah Price? Did she have any bad experiences?

content.cn_text: R:她说最糟糕的是她莫名其妙地发烧了
content.en_text: R: She said the worst part was when she got some mysterious fever in

content.cn_text: 她想她可能得被送回家了。幸运的是，情况有所好转，但她说，当你独自一人在这么远的地方生病时，感觉很可怕。
content.en_text: Mongolia and thought she might have to be sent home. Fortunately it got better but she said it was scary to feel really ill when you're alone so far away.

content.cn_text: P:那你为什么要申请呢?
content.en_text: P: So what made you want to apply?

content.cn_text: R:当我刚才在电视上看到这个节目时，我想，这是为我准备的。我一直想去旅行，但在我考虑这个问题之前，我需要工作一年。然后，一个新的系列开始了。我想现在是我的机会了。
content.en_text: R: When I saw the program on TV a while ago, I thought, this is for me. I've always wanted to travel but needed to work for a year before I could even think about it. Then, a new series started up. I thought now's my chance.

content.cn_text: L:你不觉得你会很孤单吗?
content.en_text: L: Don't you think you'll be lonely?

content.cn_text: 我想我没有时间想家了。我更担心的是有太多的事情要做，而没有足够的时间把事情整理好。
content.en_text: R: I don't think I'll have time to be homesick. I'm more worried about having too much to do and not enough time to get things organised.

content.cn_text: P:所以在接下来的几个月里，我们可能会在电视上看到你。
content.en_text: P: So we might be watching you on television in the next few months.

content.cn_text: R:希望如此。如果我幸运的话!
content.en_text: R: I hope so. If I'm lucky!

content.cn_text: L:你什么时候能确定呢?
content.en_text: L: When will you know for sure?

content.cn_text: R:他们在3月份选出最后8名。一个月后你就上路了。
content.en_text: R: They choose the final eight in March. A month later you're on your way.

content.cn_text: L:那你需要付钱吗?
content.en_text: L: So do you have to pay anything?

content.cn_text: R:没有。所有费用都已支付——课程、相机、机票、住宿和国内旅行。不过预算很紧。没有额外的。
content.en_text: R: Nothing. It's all paid for - course, camera, flights, accommodation and in-country travel. The budget is pretty tight though. No extras.

content.cn_text: P:我真的希望你能得到它。然后我每周至少会挤出时间看一个电视节目。
content.en_text: P: I sure hope you get it. Then I'll be finding time to watch at least one program on television every week.

groups.desc:
Questions 21-23
Fill in the summary below with NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER for each space.
groups.collect:
Selection Process for 'Travel Documentary'
• 34 interviewed from $12630$ applicants nationally
• 13 chosen for a $12631$ training course in film-making
• $12632$ finalists selected as competitors

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是200，因为原文中明确提到"there were over 200 applicants from around the country"。题干中要求填写申请者的数量，而不是被面试者的数量。虽然题干中提到了"34 interviewed"，但这是指被选中面试的人数，而不是总申请者数量。题目要求填写的是全国范围内的申请者数量，这正好对应原文中提到的"200 applicants from around the country"。注意，原文中使用了"over 200"，但在填空时我们只需要填写"200"，因为题目要求不超过两个词。这道题考察了你对数字信息的准确理解和对全国范围概念的把握。

这道题目的正确答案是"4 week"，因为原文中明确提到了"a 4 week training course"。让我们来分析一下为什么这是正确答案：

1. 题目要求填写的是培训课程的时长，而不是人数或其他信息。
2. 原文中提到"Thirteen are chosen"，但这是被选中的人数，不是我们要找的答案。
3. "4 week"直接描述了培训课程的持续时间，符合题目要求的"NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER"。
4. "documentary"虽然出现在同一句话中，但它描述的是电影制作的类型，而不是培训的时长。

做这类题目时，你需要注意以下几点：
1. 仔细阅读题目要求，明确所需信息的类型（这里是时间长度）。
2. 听力时重点关注与题目相关的关键词（如"training course"、"film-making"）。
3. 注意区分句子中的主要信息和次要信息。
4. 对于包含数字的题目，要特别留意听到的各种数字，并理解它们分别代表什么。

记住，在雅思听力中，答案通常会按顺序出现，所以保持专注，一旦听到相关信息就要迅速捕捉。

这道题的关键在于理解比赛的选拔流程。文中首先提到13人被选中参加培训，但这不是最终的参赛者数量。接着，使用"Then"这个转折词引出了最终的参赛者数量，即8名finalists。这里的"finalists"直接对应题干中的定位词，表示最终入选的参赛者。因此，正确答案是8。要注意的是，不要被earlier提到的13这个数字迷惑，因为它只是中间阶段的人数，而不是最终入选的参赛者数量。在做这类题目时，要特别注意数字与描述的对应关系，以及上下文的逻辑顺序。

groups.desc:
Questions 24-26
Complete the summary.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each space.
groups.collect:
Requirements of competitors:
• produce a $12633$ every two weeks
• no previous professional $12634$ experience allowed
• make their own $12635$ and obtain approval

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确理解原文中的细节信息。题目要求填写"每两周需要制作的内容"，而原文中明确提到"every 2 weeks you have to send in a 10 minute video"。这里的"send in"与题目中的"produce"是同义表达，都指制作并提交视频。因此，正确答案是"10 minute video"。注意，虽然文中多次提到"documentary"，但这里特别指明了每两周需要提交的具体内容是10分钟的视频，而不是整个纪录片。此外，答案中包含了时间长度"10 minute"，这是一个重要的细节，不能忽略。所以，完整、准确的答案应该是"10 minute video"，既包含了视频的类型，又包含了具体的时长要求。

这道题的关键在于理解题干中的"no previous professional experience allowed"与原文中的对应表达。原文中明确指出"you can't apply if you have already worked in film-making"，这直接对应了题干中的要求。"film-making"是正确答案，因为它是被明确禁止的专业经验。你需要注意，虽然原文中提到了photography和video-making可能有帮助，但它们并不是被禁止的经验。题目要求的是不允许有的专业经验，而不是有帮助的经验。因此，准确理解否定表达和题干要求是解答此题的关键。

这道题的关键在于准确理解原文中的表达。题干中的"make their own"与原文中的"makes up his or her own"是同义替换，都表示"制定自己的"。原文中明确提到"travel plans"，这正是我们需要填入空格的答案。题目要求填写不超过三个单词，因此"travel plans"是最准确的答案。注意，虽然原文中使用了"his or her"，但在填空时我们不需要包括这些代词，只需要关注核心概念"travel plans"。此外，原文中提到这些计划需要获得批准，这与题干中的"obtain approval"相呼应，进一步确认了我们定位到了正确的信息。因此，正确答案就是"travel plans"。

groups.desc:
Questions 27-28
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: What was Sarah Price's worst experience during the trip?

options.title: C
options.content: She got sick in a remote place.

items.analysis: 文中明确提到Sarah Price最糟糕的经历是在蒙古国得了一种神秘的发烧。这符合选项C "She got sick in a remote place"（她在偏远地方生病了）。蒙古国可以被视为一个偏远地方，而且她确实在那里生病了。此外，文中还强调了她独自一人在遥远的地方生病时感到可怕，这进一步证实了C选项是正确答案。

items.title: In which of the following areas does Ray expect to have most difficulty?
items.analysis: Ray表示他最担心的是时间压力问题。他明确说道他"更担心"（more worried about）的是有太多事情要做，而没有足够的时间来安排。这直接对应了选项B "time pressure"（时间压力）。Ray认为他不会有时间思乡，这表明他不太担心孤独问题。而关于组织技能，虽然他提到了安排（organised），但更多是在时间压力的context下提及的，而非作为主要担忧。因此，B选项是最符合Ray预期最大困难的答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 29-30
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
groups.collect:
In what month does the journey begin?
$12638$
Name 2 things that are provided free of charge to the competitors.
$12639$ and travel, camera, accommodation

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解时间顺序和逻辑推理。文中提到"They choose the final eight in March"，这给我们一个时间参照点。紧接着说"A month later you're on your way"，这里的"A month later"是解答的关键。我们知道三月的下一个月是四月，所以旅程开始的月份是四月（April）。这个题目考察了你对时间表达的理解能力和简单的推理能力。记住，在听力中，有时答案不会直接给出，而是需要你根据给出的信息进行简单的推断。在这种情况下，要特别注意表示时间顺序或变化的词语，如"later"、"after"、"before"等。

这道题的关键在于理解题干中的"provided free of charge"和原文中的"It's all paid for"是同义表达。原文列举了几个免费提供的项目：课程、相机、航班、住宿和国内旅行。但题干中已经提到了"camera, accommodation"，所以我们需要从剩余的选项中选择两个。"course"和"flights"是剩余选项中最明确的两个，而且它们都是参加这个比赛所必需的。"in-country travel"虽然也是免费提供的，但它不是从一个国家到另一个国家的主要交通方式，所以不如"flights"更符合题意。因此，正确答案是"course"和"flights"。这道题考察了学生的细节辨别能力和逻辑推理能力，要求学生能够准确理解听力内容，并结合题干信息做出正确判断。
